tasks.prompt: Fix CliRunner so that data written to stderr without an explicit flush (e.g. using print with flush=False) is properly captured in the test result. Currently, unflushed stderr writes are lost when CliRunner.invoke finishes.

predicted_writes.reason: manual: ACG predictor returned empty allowed_paths/predicted_writes for click; populated from manifest ground_truth_files. Predictor accuracy on click is a separate paper finding.
manual: test file from manifest ground_truth_files

file_scopes.reason: CliRunner is implemented here; fixing unflushed stderr capture requires modifying the invoke method or stream handling. Candidate context only; requires replan before write. Signals: bm25, llm, pagerank. Scope review kept this file at its existing tier.

Changelog typically updated when a bug fix is made to Click. Candidate context only; requires replan before write. Signals: cochange, llm. Scope review requested a drop, but protected evidence kept it.
